game.title.description: Name of the Solitaire game card.
game.title.notes: Use the locale's standard name for Klondike / classic Solitaire.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Solitaire game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Solitaire play button.

drawMode.title.description: Title asking the player to choose draw-1 or draw-3.

drawMode.body.description: Body text explaining the draw-mode choice.

score.label.description: Live score readout at the top of the board.

score.moves.description: Live move-count readout at the top of the board.

action.autoComplete.description: Button that finishes a trivially-winnable deal in one tap.

action.newGame.description: New Game button in the header.

action.submitScore.description: Primary CTA on the win modal — submits the score to the leaderboard.

action.dealAgain.description: Button label to deal a fresh game after finishing one.

win.title.description: Header of the win modal — celebrates the win.

win.score.description: Line showing the final score on the win modal.

win.rank.description: Confirmation after a successful leaderboard submit.

win.namePlaceholder.description: Placeholder inside the name text field.

win.nameLabel.description: Accessibility label for the name text field.

win.nameHint.description: Accessibility hint explaining what the name is used for.

stock.recycle.description: Warning that recycling the waste back to stock costs 50 points after the first time.

pile.stock.label.description: Accessibility label on the stock pile — announces draw mode and remaining cards.
pile.stock.label.notes: {{count}} is the draw mode (1 or 3); {{remaining}} is how many cards are left.

pile.stock.empty.description: Accessibility label when the stock is empty and tapping will recycle.

pile.waste.empty.description: Accessibility label on the empty waste slot.

pile.tableau.label.description: Accessibility label on a non-empty tableau column.
pile.tableau.label.notes: {{col}} is the 1-indexed column; {{count}} is the number of cards in it.

pile.tableau.empty.description: Accessibility label on an empty tableau column slot.

pile.foundation.empty.description: Accessibility label on an empty foundation pile.

suit.spades.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.hearts.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.diamonds.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

suit.clubs.notes: Use the standard card-game name in the locale.

card.faceDown.description: Accessibility label for a face-down card.

card.faceDownSelected.description: Accessibility label for a face-down card that is currently selected.

card.faceUp.description: Accessibility label for a face-up card — 'Ace of Spades', etc.
card.faceUp.notes: {{rank}} is rendered as 'A','2'-'10','J','Q','K' — do not translate single-letter ranks. {{suit}} is already-localized.

card.faceUpSelected.description: Accessibility label for a face-up card that is selected.
card.faceUpSelected.notes: Same conventions as card.faceUp; add a '(selected)' annotation idiomatic to the locale.

a11y.boardRegion.description: Accessibility region label wrapping the whole board.

a11y.invalidMove.description: Announcement fired when the player attempts an illegal move.

error.saveFailed.description: Error message when saving progress to local storage fails.

error.loadFailed.description: Error message when restoring a saved game fails.

error.submitFailed.description: Error message when submitting the score to the leaderboard fails.

error.submitRetry.description: Button label that retries a failed leaderboard submit.
